height.$description: dimension used by the button component for xs height.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the button component for xs padding inline.

gap.$description: dimension used by the button component for xs gap (MarsUI effective icon-to-text gap 4px).

radius.$description: dimension used by the button component for xs radius.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for xs font size (MarsUI caption_1 10px).

line-height.$description: dimension used by the button component for xs line height (MarsUI caption_1 16px).

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for xs icon size (MarsUI 14px).

min-target.$description: dimension used by the button component for xs min target.

height.$description: dimension used by the button component for sm height.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the button component for sm padding inline.

gap.$description: dimension used by the button component for sm gap (interpolated between xs and md effective gaps).

radius.$description: dimension used by the button component for sm radius.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for sm font size.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the button component for sm line height.

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for sm icon size.

min-target.$description: dimension used by the button component for sm min target.

height.$description: dimension used by the button component for md height.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the button component for md padding inline.

gap.$description: dimension used by the button component for md gap (MarsUI effective icon-to-text gap 6px).

radius.$description: dimension used by the button component for md radius.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for md font size.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the button component for md line height.

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for md icon size.

min-target.$description: dimension used by the button component for md min target.

height.$description: dimension used by the button component for lg height.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the button component for lg padding inline.

gap.$description: dimension used by the button component for lg gap.

radius.$description: dimension used by the button component for lg radius.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for lg font size.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the button component for lg line height.

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for lg icon size.

min-target.$description: dimension used by the button component for lg min target.

height.$description: dimension used by the button component for xl height.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the button component for xl padding inline (MarsUI 14px).

gap.$description: dimension used by the button component for xl gap (MarsUI effective icon-to-text gap 8px).

radius.$description: dimension used by the button component for xl radius.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for xl font size.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the button component for xl line height.

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the button component for xl icon size.

min-target.$description: dimension used by the button component for xl min target.

font-family.$description: font family used by the button component for font family.

font-weight.$description: font weight used by the button component for font weight.

padding-block.$description: dimension used by the button component for padding block (MarsUI: 4px in every size).

backdrop-blur.$description: backdrop blur used by the button component glass variants (primary/secondary). material3 resolves to blur none via the semantic override.

color.$description: color used by the button component for focus ring color.

width.$description: dimension used by the button component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the button component for focus ring offset.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the button component for the focus ring glow (MarsUI Focus/primary: 3px spread ring).

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral rest background (MarsUI Surface/primary_med_em, brand 500).

fg.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral rest foreground.

border.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral rest border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral hover background (MarsUI: rest fill; hover lightening comes from the hover overlay).

fg.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral hover foreground.

border.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral hover border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral active background (MarsUI defines no pressed state; mirrors rest).

fg.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral active foreground.

border.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral active border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral disabled background. Deliberate deviation: Figma disabled is Surface/disabled_base_em gray.100 with gray.400 text (≈1.4:1); Kimen keeps gray.200 for contrast (precedent 010 D2, pending founder ratification).

fg.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral disabled foreground. Deliberate deviation: Figma disabled text is text/base_em gray.400 (≈1.4:1 on gray.100); Kimen keeps text.muted gray.700 for readable disabled text (precedent 010 D2, pending founder ratification).

border.$description: color used by the button component for primary neutral disabled border.

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary success rest background. Deliberate deviation: Figma specifies the 500 ramp (Surface/success_med_em #409b3f) but white on 500 is ≈3.5:1 < AA 4.5:1; Kimen keeps the 700 ramp (precedent 010 D2, pending founder ratification).

fg.$description: color used by the button component for primary success rest foreground.

border.$description: color used by the button component for primary success rest border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary success hover background (MarsUI: rest fill; hover lightening comes from the hover overlay).

fg.$description: color used by the button component for primary success hover foreground.

border.$description: color used by the button component for primary success hover border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary success active background.

fg.$description: color used by the button component for primary success active foreground.

border.$description: color used by the button component for primary success active border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary success disabled background.

fg.$description: color used by the button component for primary success disabled foreground.

border.$description: color used by the button component for primary success disabled border.

bg.$description: color used by the button component for primary danger rest background. Deliberate deviation: Figma specifies the 500 ramp (Surface/danger_med_em #f05149) but white on 500 is ≈3.5:1 < AA 4.5:1; Kimen keeps the 700 ramp (precedent 010 D2, pending founder ratification).

shadow.$description: shadow used by the button component for button primary rest shadow (MarsUI Component_effect/primary_default).

shadow.$description: shadow used by the button component for button primary hover shadow (MarsUI Component_effect/primary_hover).

overlay.$description: color used by the button component for the primary hover overlay layer (MarsUI hover_overlay, White/5).

value used by the button component for primary disabled shadow.
